title: Charge case inside screen/forth screen, left zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide charge case illustration zoom toggle on fourth screen via left circle button
steps: Open the Quick Start Guide (QSG) in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Swipe to the fourth screen of the QSG.
Tap the left circle button on the charge case illustration.
Observe the zoom-in effect and new text displayed.
Tap the same left circle button again.
expected: The charge case illustration zooms out to the original screen showing the charge case inside.
